## Runtime.Session.IEditingSessionValidator.scaleToTargetWeight() method

Scales the filling to achieve a target weight using a weakly-typed number. Weight-contributing ingredients are scaled proportionally.

**Signature:**

```typescript
scaleToTargetWeight(targetWeight: number): Result<Measurement>;
```

Desired total weight (will be converted)


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

Result&lt;[Measurement](./ts-chocolate.measurement.md)<!-- -->&gt;
